title: EventNotification
description: Configuration for envelope event notifications via DocuSign Connect webhooks.

url.description: The webhook endpoint URL to receive notifications.

loggingEnabled.description: When true, Connect logging is enabled.

includeCertificateOfCompletion.description: When true, includes the certificate of completion.

includeDocuments.description: When true, includes document PDFs in the notification.

includeDocumentFields.description: When true, includes document custom fields.

includeHMAC.description: When true, includes HMAC security headers.

includeTimeZone.description: When true, includes time zone information.
